fields.name: _id
fields.description: The internal ID generated by Novu for your subscriber. This ID does not match the `subscriberId` used in your queries. Refer to `subscriberId` for that identifier.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: The first name of the subscriber.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: The last name of the subscriber.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The email address of the subscriber.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: The phone number of the subscriber.

fields.name: avatar
fields.description: The URL of the subscriber's avatar image.

fields.name: locale
fields.description: The locale setting of the subscriber, indicating their preferred language or region.

fields.name: channels
fields.description: An array of channel settings associated with the subscriber.

fields.name: topics
fields.description: An array of topics that the subscriber is subscribed to.

fields.name: isOnline
fields.description: Indicates whether the subscriber is currently online.

fields.name: lastOnlineAt
fields.description: The timestamp indicating when the subscriber was last online, in ISO 8601 format.

fields.name: __v
fields.description: The version of the subscriber document.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Additional custom data for the subscriber

fields.name: timezone
fields.description: Timezone of the subscriber

fields.name: subscriberId
fields.description: The identifier used to create this subscriber, which typically corresponds to the user ID in your system.

fields.name: _organizationId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the organization to which the subscriber belongs.

fields.name: _environmentId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the environment associated with this subscriber.

fields.name: deleted
fields.description: Indicates whether the subscriber has been deleted.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp indicating when the subscriber was created, in ISO 8601 format.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: The timestamp indicating when the subscriber was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.
